name: agentic-loop
description: Multi-model agentic loop for Claude Code: orchestrator, tiered subagents, bash-shim workers, the unattended factory, opt-in observability, and evals.

plugins.name: agentic-loop
plugins.description: Orchestrated multi-model agentic loop: Opus orchestrator, tiered native subagents, bash-shim workers for Sol/Fable/OpenRouter/Ollama, bounded cross-family adversarial review, the spec/build/review factory, opt-in observability with run-tree reports, feature flags, and a built-in eval harness.
